commands.review_summary:
The PR raises Codex app-server `message` dynamic tool calls to a 120s default timeout while leaving ordinary dynamic tools at 30s and adding focused resolver coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main gives `message` dynamic tool calls the generic 30s Codex watchdog while Telegram text sends can use 60s per request and multiple sequential chunks. I did not run a live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
